# Omics Bad Density Fixture

## Course-Level Exam Map
Coverage note: this report focuses on repeated broad topics from historical papers.

### Module: Omics vocabulary and data-scale logic
Priority: 必备
Evidence / Example Function:
Omics data can be large and includes sequencing and protein analysis.

### Module: PCR and cloning workflow
Priority: 重点
Exam-Ready Knowledge Synthesis:
PCR, ligase, restriction cloning, BioBrick, Golden Gate, Gibson, and mutagenesis are all useful molecular biology methods.

### Module: DNA sequencing principles
Priority: 重点
Exam-Ready Knowledge Synthesis:
Sanger, 454, Illumina, coverage, assembly, BLAST, annotation, transcriptomics, protein informatics, expression systems, purification, proteomics, metabolomics, and genetic manipulation are broad omics tools.
